content_body: A group of 14+ rented two cabins to celebrate one of our beloved friend’s birthday. The cabins were breathtaking. When they say the kitchen is fully loaded, it definitely is! We stayed at the Riverview Lodge and it came complete with blenders, waffle maker, pots and pans, spoons and cooking utensils. We had everything we needed to make this a memorable event. The bedrooms were huge and immaculate. It exceeded my expectations. The owner is one of the kindest and professional individuals you would ever meet. It was easy to contact him for any questions we had. I would definitely do this again! Thanks Gary from Antoinette 2/21/20 birthday bash!
title: Blue Ridge Luxury Cabins with Every Amenity!
